title: Yoda Totem
description: Yoda Star Wars Totem Resource Pack
body:
Just a Star Wars Yoda Totem Resource Pack

This is a fun resourse pack for those ho likes Star wars and Yoda.

This resource pack contains a retextured item, which is the totem, and a sound change — the sound change is use_totem sound. The totem’s texture is now Yoda from Star Wars, and the sound has been replaced with one that matches the new texture.
